# FILE_MAP.md

## Codex May Edit Mainly

- `app/main.py`
- `app/gui.py`
- `app/services/business_logic.py`
- `app/error_handler.py`
- `README.md`
- `CHANGELOG.md`
- `version.json`
- `latest.json`
- `RELEASE_WORKFLOW.md`

## Do Not Edit Unless Needed

- `app/update_manager.py`
- `app/updater_launcher.py`
- `updater/updater.py`
- `app/logger.py`
- `app/crash_handler.py`
- `build.bat`

## Stable Framework Files

- `app/config.py`
- `app/version_checker.py`
- `PROJECT_SPEC.md`
- `PROJECT_TEMPLATE_CONFIG.json`

## Runtime Folders

- `logs/`
- `backup/`
- `temp/`
- `assets/`
